title: On load, Meter/Lab mode shows the photo preview with aperture, shutter, and ISO dials plus the exposure meter
On load (or after opening Presets/Compare), the presets list shows at least 6 seeded exposure looks with names and stop readouts
After creating a preset named 'Golden Hour Soft' with valid stops, the text 'Golden Hour Soft' is visible in the presets list
After adding 3 new presets on top of the seed set, the presets list shows exactly 3 more rows than the initial seeded count
After applying a seeded preset, the dial labels update to that preset's aperture/shutter/ISO and the preview meter/brightness respond
After editing a preset name to 'Night Street Grain', the text 'Night Street Grain' is visible in the list and the previous name is not
After deleting a preset, that preset's name is no longer visible in the presets list
After deleting all presets, an empty state message is visible and no preset rows remain
After submitting create with an empty required preset name, the presets count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After filtering presets by favorites or a look tag (with mixed items present), only matching presets remain visible
After switching between Meter/Lab and Presets/Compare modes, the main canvas shows the other mode without full page navigation
When hovering steppers, preset rows, or primary controls, a visible hover wash, brightness, or shadow change appears
